title: Tao Te Ching 41
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 41 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 41 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: When the highest type of person hears the Tao, they practice it diligently. When the average person hears the Tao, they half believe it.
